name: KTM SX-F 250/350 Stealth Kit
description: Full graphic kit for KTM SX-F 250/350. Printed on Substance Inc. X1 UltraCurve with UltraCurve 1500 overlaminate, UV-resistant. Includes shroud, tank, fork guard, and side plate graphics. Fits 2023–2025 models.

name: Husqvarna FE 350 Coyote Kit
description: Enduro graphic kit with Coyote Tan colourway. Designed for the Husqvarna FE 350. Printed on Substance Inc. X1 UltraCurve with UltraCurve 1500 overlaminate.

name: Yamaha YZ250F Acid Kit
description: Acid Lime signature kit for Yamaha YZ250F. Fits 2024–2025 models. Full shroud, tank and fork guard graphics.

name: Honda CRF 450R Stealth Kit
description: Stealth Charcoal full kit for Honda CRF 450R. Fits 2021–2024 models.

name: KTM SX-F Gripper Seat Cover
description: Gripper seat cover matched to Griffix graphic kits. Ribbed gripper surface for maximum control. Fits KTM SX-F 250/350/450 2023–2025.

name: Custom Number Plate Kit
description: Custom printed number plates, set of 3 (front + two sides). Choose your number, background and font. Universal fit — trimmed to shape.

name: KTM Factory 26 Full Graphic Kit
description: Full Graphics Kit includes printed graphics for Tank Shrouds, Side Number Plates, Airbox, Rear Fender, Front Fender, Front Number Plate, Fork Guards, and Swingarms. Printed on high-tac vinyl with thick high-gloss laminate for maximum durability. Bold Factory 26 design with striking orange and blue colour scheme. Does not include seat covers or plastics.
